entries.statement: Design, train, evaluate, and document machine learning models, including feature engineering decisions, algorithm selection rationale, and evaluation results against baseline.
Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, performance characteristics, known limitations, and monitoring recommendations.
Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, data drift, and conditions requiring model retraining or replacement.

Implement model monitoring and observability systems, including performance dashboards, drift detection, degradation alerting, incident response procedures, and automated retraining triggers when defined thresholds are exceeded.

Build and maintain automated ML pipelines from data ingestion and feature engineering through model training, validation, deployment, and monitoring, ensuring reproducibility and auditability at every stage.
Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
Evaluate AI application performance against defined quality, safety, and reliability criteria, documenting test results and identified failure modes.
Design and implement NLP systems for defined business tasks, including model selection, data preparation, fine-tuning, evaluation, and deployment documentation.
Conduct linguistic analysis and error analysis on NLP system outputs, documenting failure patterns and recommending model or data improvements.
Design and build computer vision systems for defined business applications, including dataset preparation, model training, evaluation, deployment, and performance monitoring.
Design and document the enterprise ML platform architecture, including training infrastructure, feature store design, model registry, serving layer, and monitoring stack.
Define MLOps standards and pipeline templates that enable data science teams to move models to production without bespoke engineering effort for each use case.
Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision records with documented rationale and re-evaluation criteria.
Collaborate with data architects and analysts to translate data consumption requirements into pipeline designs and storage structures.
Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
Design and execute research projects that advance organizational AI capability, including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, execution, and findings documentation.
Manage the enterprise AI innovation pipeline, including ideation facilitation, use case triage, prototype development prioritization, and POC results communication.
Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.

Conduct AI risk assessments across the system lifecycle, including risk identification, impact analysis, likelihood estimation, and documentation of proportionate mitigation measures for different risk categories.

Evaluate AI systems for fairness and bias, including applying fairness metrics across protected attributes, assessing training data representativeness, and documenting disparate impact findings and mitigation actions.

Design and execute adversarial testing and red-teaming exercises for AI systems, including robustness evaluation, prompt injection testing, evasion attack simulation, and identification of failure modes under adversarial conditions.

Produce regulatory-grade AI system documentation, including technical specifications, risk management records, conformity assessment evidence, training data provenance reports, and instructions-for-use documentation that meets applicable regulatory standards.

Execute AI training data governance, including data provenance tracking, annotation quality assurance, representativeness assessment, synthetic data validation, and documentation of data preparation decisions and their impact on model behavior.

Design and implement human oversight mechanisms for AI systems, including human-in-the-loop and human-on-the-loop architectures, override capabilities, and trust calibration interfaces appropriate to system risk level.

Conduct AI use case feasibility assessments, including data availability evaluation, technical complexity estimation, organizational readiness analysis, and business value quantification to inform prioritization decisions.

Orchestrate end-to-end AI system integration and deployment, including coordinating model deployment with enterprise systems, managing API contracts, configuring infrastructure for AI workloads, and automating promotion workflows from development to production.

Implement AI system transparency and explainability mechanisms, including model interpretability techniques, output explanation methods, and confidence communication appropriate to different user contexts and regulatory requirements.
Manage AI system incidents, including detection, triage, root cause analysis, risk assessment, corrective action implementation, and regulatory reporting where required.

Design and deliver AI literacy and training programs, including competency assessment, curriculum development for technical and non-technical audiences, and evaluation of training effectiveness in building organizational AI fluency.

Assess third-party AI components and pre-trained model risks, including vendor evaluation, intellectual property review, performance validation under local conditions, dependency mapping, and contingency planning for service disruption.

Design and implement AI feedback incorporation systems, including user feedback collection mechanisms, stakeholder adjudication processes, feedback-driven model improvement loops, and community reporting channels.

Maintain an organizational AI system inventory, including cataloging deployed systems, tracking system attributes and risk classifications, documenting lifecycle status, and supporting organizational visibility into AI system deployment.

Plan and execute AI system decommissioning, including safe phase-out procedures, risk assessment during transition, data retention decisions, stakeholder notification, and documentation of decommissioning rationale and outcomes.

Optimize AI workload cost and resource utilization, including compute resource allocation, GPU scheduling efficiency, cloud cost management, and trade-off analysis between model performance and operational expense.

Communicate AI system capabilities, limitations, and risk findings to executive stakeholders and cross-functional partners, translating technical assessment results into business impact language and actionable recommendations.
